18688.headline: Ulia the Stone Father was named among the gods.
18688.description: Ulia the Stone Father is a vengeful creator of mountains and stone for Peak Rite of Armere. The god controls creation, prophecy, miracles, commandments, is marked by a white peak, and demands that followers raise cairns for the lost. Its creation claim says it raised Junwatch under stone signs so boundaries would be remembered; its religious mandate says religion must guard sacred bounds and raise cairns for the lost. Prophecies come through cairn falls, cave echoes, and a white peak appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny presses through ruin, warning, and punishment, miracles lean toward storm, and commandments lean toward taboo.

18689.headline: Nordrim the Peak Mother was named among the gods.
18689.description: Nordrim the Peak Mother is a distant judge of mountains and stone for Peak Rite of Armere. The god controls commandments, is marked by a cairn stone, and demands that followers ask leave before deep digging. Its creation claim says it raised Junwatch under stone signs so boundaries would be remembered; its religious mandate says religion must guard sacred bounds and ask leave before deep digging. Prophecies come through cairn falls, cave echoes, and a cairn stone appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny is enforced through tests, public duties, and costly proof, miracles lean toward healing, and commandments lean toward law.

18690.headline: Arton the Deep Keeper was named among the gods.
18690.description: Arton the Deep Keeper is a capricious keeper of mountains and stone for Peak Rite of Armere. The god controls prophecy, is marked by a deep cave, and demands that followers guard boundary stones. Its creation claim says it raised Junwatch under stone signs so boundaries would be remembered; its religious mandate says religion must guard sacred bounds and guard boundary stones. Prophecies come through cairn falls, cave echoes, and a deep cave appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny bends through reversals, bargains, and misread signs, miracles lean toward harvest, and commandments lean toward taboo.

18691.headline: Toradia the Stone Father was named among the gods.
18691.description: Toradia the Stone Father is a distant judge of mountains and stone for Peak Rite of Armere. The god controls commandments, miracles, religion, is marked by a black horn, and demands that followers ask leave before deep digging. Its creation claim says it raised Junwatch under stone signs so boundaries would be remembered; its religious mandate says religion must guard sacred bounds and ask leave before deep digging. Prophecies come through cairn falls, cave echoes, and a black horn appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny is enforced through tests, public duties, and costly proof, miracles lean toward victory, and commandments lean toward law.

The creation claim says Ulia the Stone Father raised Junwatch under stone signs so boundaries would be remembered. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Lorwatch Rootmouth.

Its honored virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. The religious mandate behind it says religion must guard sacred bounds and raise cairns for the lost.
